name: Evan Cather - Upper East Side Golf Lessons
about: Evan Cather Golf Instruction is a premier golf training studio with two locations: The Hack Shack in Midtown Manhattan and Randalls Island Golf Center. The Hack Shack is equipped with Trackman 4 technology, the #1 simulator used on the PGA Tour, and offers a high-tech environment for lessons and practice. Randalls Island is the only full-length driving range in Manhattan with grass tees, a multi-level hitting area, chipping green, and practice bunker. The studio is led by Evan Cather, a Jim McLean Master Instructor with a background teaching at the prestigious Doral Resort, offering instruction to players of all skill levels from beginners to tour professionals.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to top-tier Trackman 4 launch monitor technology for precise data
Instruction from a Jim McLean Master Instructor with a proven pedigree
Comprehensive video analysis and Bodi Trak Pressure Mat feedback included with every lesson
Two convenient NYC locations, including a full-length driving range on Randalls Island

food_and_drink.notes: No bar or alcohol service mentioned

simulator_hardware.notes: Trackman 4 with Bodi Trak Pressure Mat

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own golf clubs for lessons and practice sessions.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food or drink service, so bringing your own may be necessary.

faq.answer: The website does not specify the duration for an 18-hole simulator round.
